visualizerParams.title: Recursive Negabinary Conversion
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The current `to_negabinary` function uses an iterative `while` loop. Refactor it to use a recursive approach, which can be more mathematically elegant for base conversion problems.

solution.explanation: The recursive approach breaks the problem down into finding the last digit and then recursively converting the remaining quotient. This often provides a clearer mapping to the mathematical definition of the conversion process.
